creator: john@pcbsd.org
text:
On Tue, Nov 22, 2011 at 07:50:21AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/pianobar,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/162750 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.


I approve! He and I are one and the same! Ugh! I should use this email
address when updating this port, shouldn't I?!!!

- John

> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/162750
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
